https://industrial-ai.example/maintenanc.title: Industrial AI maintenance workbench patterns
https://industrial-ai.example/maintenanc.text: A synthetic recorded article describing an industrial AI maintenance decision workbench. It combines asset hierarchy, sensor history, EAM work orders, fault codes, maintenance logs, engineer feedback, confidence boundaries, and rollback rules. The workflow keeps the reliability engineer responsible for final decisions and documents when the model should defer.

https://cases.example/predictive-mainten.title: Predictive maintenance case with EAM integration
https://cases.example/predictive-mainten.text: A synthetic recorded implementation case for predictive maintenance. The project connected vibration sensor history, CMMS/EAM work orders, failure reports, and operator notes. The useful pattern is not autonomous repair, but a decision support workbench that recommends inspection priorities, explains confidence, and records human overrides.

https://benchmark.example/maintenance-an.title: Maintenance benchmark report for anomaly detection
https://benchmark.example/maintenance-an.text: A synthetic benchmark report about anomaly detection for rotating equipment. It reports precision and recall under asset-class drift, label scarcity, and incomplete maintenance logs. The report warns that generic leaderboard metrics are insufficient without site-specific acceptance tests.
